title: Animarmor
description: Adds new armors and taming mechanics to mobs
body:
![animarmor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/269654a7b9f48a1e89be0590a39a0c255bef7442_0.webp)

Animarmor adds new craftable armors for all of your pets; Wolves, Cats, Parrots, Foxes, Rabbits, Pigs, Hoglins, Striders, and Blazes.

CONTENT

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


Hoglin Armor - Hoglins can now be tamed while babies with Nether Wart. They can be equipped with Hoglin Armor as well as Hogdye to dye their tusks, Magma Cream to increase speed and damage, and the Lava Launcher to shoot out fireballs on attacks. They can be fed any foodstuff to grow their size and health. 

Blaze Armor - Blazes can now be constructed with a Pumpkin, a Gold Block, and a Magma Block. They shoot out fireballs at mobs that the owner attacks.

Armored Illagers - Illagers render worn armor and wear special Pillager and Vindicator Helmets to raids. In Woodland Mansions, Royal Guards are special Vindicator variants that equip a new set of armor and use shields.

Taming Rabbits - Rabbits are now tameable with golden carrots.

</details>

Join the Redev discord for developments & updates - https://discord.gg/jWN5cduHkT

Happy exploring!
